requirement_topic.en: EOS Conformity Certificate — Mandatory Import Clearance for Heat Pump / AC Units
requirement_topic.zh: EOS符合性证书——热泵/空调进口强制清关要求
requirement_topic.zht: EOS符合性證書——熱泵/空調進口強制清關要求

summary.en: The Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS) requires imported regulated products, including air-conditioners and heat pump appliances, to hold an EOS conformity certificate prior to customs clearance. The certificate is issued against applicable Egyptian Standard (ES) specifications, which are substantially aligned to IEC standards. Test reports must originate from an EGAC-accredited laboratory or a recognised foreign laboratory; CCC certificates and Chinese-market test reports issued by non-EGAC-accredited bodies are not accepted as EOS conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 埃及标准化与质量组织（EOS）要求进口受管制产品（包括空调器和热泵电器）在清关前持有EOS符合性证书。该证书依据适用的埃及标准（ES）规范颁发，这些标准与IEC标准基本接轨。测试报告须来自EGAC认可实验室或获认可的境外实验室；非EGAC认可机构出具的CCC证书和中国市场测试报告不被EOS接受为符合性证据。
summary.zht: 埃及標準化與質量組織（EOS）要求進口受管制產品（包括空調器和熱泵電器）在清關前持有EOS符合性證書。該證書依據適用的埃及標準（ES）規範頒發，這些標準與IEC標準基本接軌。測試報告須來自EGAC認可實驗室或獲認可的境外實驗室；非EGAC認可機構出具的CCC證書和中國市場測試報告不被EOS接受為符合性證據。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS) conformity certification scheme
Egyptian Standard (ES) — aligned to IEC 60335-2-40 for heat pump / AC safety
Egyptian Accreditation Council (EGAC) laboratory accreditation requirement

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers household air-conditioners and heat pumps for the domestic market, administered by CNCA and tested to GB standards including GB 4706.32 (safety, aligned to IEC 60335-2-40) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC is mandatory for domestic sale but is not recognised by EOS for Egyptian market access.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制性产品认证）覆盖国内市场的家用空调器和热泵，由CNCA主管，测试标准包括GB 4706.32（安全，与IEC 60335-2-40接轨）和GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）。CCC为国内销售所必需，但不被EOS认可用于进入埃及市场。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制性產品認證）覆蓋國內市場的家用空調器和熱泵，由CNCA主管，測試標準包括GB 4706.32（安全，與IEC 60335-2-40接軌）和GB 4343.1（電磁相容）。CCC為國內銷售所必需，但不被EOS認可用於進入埃及市場。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute the EOS conformity certificate. Chinese exporters must obtain an EOS conformity certificate supported by test evidence from an EGAC-accredited or EOS-recognised laboratory. Existing GB-basis test reports from non-EGAC-accredited bodies do not satisfy Egyptian import clearance requirements. The exporter or Egyptian importer must initiate the EOS certification process prior to shipment.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代EOS符合性证书。中国出口商须取得EOS符合性证书，并附上来自EGAC认可或EOS承认实验室的测试证据。非EGAC认可机构出具的GB依据测试报告不满足埃及进口清关要求。出口商或埃及进口商须在发货前启动EOS认证流程。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代EOS符合性證書。中國出口商須取得EOS符合性證書，並附上來自EGAC認可或EOS承認實驗室的測試證據。非EGAC認可機構出具的GB依據測試報告不滿足埃及進口清關要求。出口商或埃及進口商須在發貨前啟動EOS認證流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EOS conformity certificate required for customs clearance of regulated imported products in Egypt
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market sale under CCC; CCC is not recognised by EOS

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — an EOS conformity certificate from an EGAC-accredited or EOS-recognised lab is required for Egypt import clearance; Chinese CCC certificates are not accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——埃及进口清关需持有EGAC认可或EOS承认实验室出具的EOS符合性证书；中国CCC证书不被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——埃及進口清關需持有EGAC認可或EOS承認實驗室出具的EOS符合性證書；中國CCC證書不被接受。
